description: CompositionBlack and white striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket with ruffles around it, three quarter sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemFitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryarrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This shirt, with its understated hue is designed with an easy silhouette. Pair it with a pencil skirt and jeans, closed toe pumps and a tonal scarf.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
